questions.question: Who is the first man named in 1 Chronicles chapter 1?
questions.explanation: 1 Chronicles 1 begins with Adam as the first man named in the genealogy.

questions.question: Which descendant of Japheth is listed first in chapter 1?
questions.explanation: Gomer is the first son of Japheth named in 1 Chronicles 1.

questions.question: Who was the mighty hunter on the earth listed in chapter 1?
questions.explanation: Nimrod is described as a mighty one upon the earth in 1 Chronicles 1.

questions.question: Who is named as one of the sons of Shem in chapter 1?
questions.explanation: Arphaxad is one of the sons of Shem listed in 1 Chronicles 1.

questions.question: Which son of Abraham is listed after Ishmael?
questions.explanation: Isaac is named as Abraham's son after Ishmael in 1 Chronicles 1.

questions.question: Who reigned in Edom after Bela the son of Beor?
questions.explanation: Jobab succeeded Bela as king of Edom in 1 Chronicles 1.

questions.question: Who is the firstborn son of David recorded in Hebron?
questions.explanation: Amnon is listed as David's firstborn son from Hebron in 1 Chronicles 2.

questions.question: How many years did David reign in Hebron?
questions.explanation: David reigned seven years and six months in Hebron according to 1 Chronicles 2.

questions.question: Who is named as Solomon's father in 1 Chronicles 2?
questions.explanation: David is Solomon's father, as stated in 1 Chronicles 2.

questions.question: Who is the father of Jehoiakim and Zedekiah in this genealogy?
questions.explanation: Josiah is listed as the father of Jehoiakim and Zedekiah in 1 Chronicles 2.

questions.question: Who was Zerubbabel's sister according to the genealogy?
questions.explanation: Shelomith is named as the sister of Zerubbabel in 1 Chronicles 2.

questions.question: Who prayed to God asking to be kept from evil and to have his territory enlarged?
questions.explanation: Jabez prayed for blessing and protection in 1 Chronicles 4.

questions.question: What did God grant Jabez after his prayer?
questions.explanation: God granted Jabez's request according to 1 Chronicles 4.

questions.question: Which tribe was the firstborn of Israel but lost the birthright because he defiled his father's bed?
questions.explanation: Reuben is described as the firstborn who lost the birthright in 1 Chronicles 5.

questions.question: Which nation did the tribes fight when they cried to God and were helped?
questions.explanation: The Reubenites, Gadites, and half tribe of Manasseh fought the Hagarites in 1 Chronicles 5.

questions.question: Who were the three sons of Levi?
questions.explanation: Levi's sons are Gershon, Kohath, and Merari in 1 Chronicles 6.

questions.question: Which priest executed the service in the temple Solomon built?
questions.explanation: Azariah is described as carrying out priestly service in Solomon's temple in 1 Chronicles 6.

questions.question: Which city of Judah was given to the sons of Aaron?
questions.explanation: Hebron was given to Aaron's descendants as one of their cities in 1 Chronicles 6.

questions.question: How many cities were given to the sons of Merari?
questions.explanation: Twelve cities were allotted to the sons of Merari in 1 Chronicles 6.

questions.question: How many mighty men were from the sons of Tola according to their generations?
questions.explanation: The sons of Tola numbered twenty-two thousand six hundred men in 1 Chronicles 7.

questions.question: How many men of valour were the sons of Becher counted as?
questions.correct_answer: Twenty-two thousand and thirty and four
options: Twenty-two thousand and thirty and four
questions.explanation: The sons of Becher were reckoned as twenty-two thousand thirty and four mighty men in 1 Chronicles 7.

questions.question: Who was the father of Machir the father of Gilead?
questions.explanation: Machir is described as the son of Manasseh in 1 Chronicles 7.

questions.question: Who was the wife of Machir that bore Peresh and Sheresh?
questions.explanation: Maachah is named as Machir's wife in 1 Chronicles 7.

questions.question: Which town is mentioned as part of the possessions of Ephraim's descendants?
questions.explanation: Beth-el is listed among the possessions of Ephraim's descendants in 1 Chronicles 7.

questions.question: How many men of valour were chosen from the tribe of Asher?
questions.explanation: The tribe of Asher had twenty-six thousand mighty men in 1 Chronicles 7.

questions.question: Who is listed as the firstborn son of Benjamin in chapter 8?
questions.explanation: Bela is named as Benjamin's firstborn son in 1 Chronicles 8.

questions.question: Which of these is a son of Bela?
questions.explanation: Addar is listed among the sons of Bela in 1 Chronicles 8.

questions.question: Who was the father of Uzza and Ahihud?
questions.explanation: Naaman is named as the father of Uzza and Ahihud in 1 Chronicles 8.

questions.question: Which captives returned to dwell in Jerusalem in the first year of Cyrus?
questions.explanation: 1 Chronicles 9 records the return of Israelites and Jews in the first year of Cyrus.

questions.question: What service did the gatekeepers perform?
questions.correct_answer: Guarded the thresholds of the temple
options: Guarded the thresholds of the temple
questions.explanation: Gatekeepers were responsible for guarding temple thresholds in 1 Chronicles 9.

questions.question: Who is the mighty man that killed three hundred men with a spear in chapter 11?
questions.explanation: Abishai killed three hundred men with his spear according to 1 Chronicles 11.

questions.question: Who was opposed to David bringing the ark to Jerusalem?
questions.explanation: Uzzah and Ahio were the sons of Abinadab involved when the ark was moved toward Jerusalem.

questions.question: Why did God strike Uzzah dead?
questions.correct_answer: For touching the ark of the Lord
options: For touching the ark of the Lord
questions.explanation: Uzzah touched the ark to steady it and was struck down for it in 1 Chronicles 13.

questions.question: Who was chosen to carry the ark of God after the first attempt failed?
questions.explanation: After Uzzah's death, David appointed the Levites to carry the ark properly in 1 Chronicles 15.

questions.question: Which phrase introduces David's song of thanksgiving?
options: Bless the name of the Lord
Shout unto God with the voice of triumph
questions.explanation: David begins his song of thanksgiving with 'Give thanks unto the Lord' in 1 Chronicles 16.

questions.question: Who stirred up David to number Israel?
questions.explanation: 1 Chronicles 21:1 says Satan rose up against Israel and provoked David to number them.

questions.question: How many men were in Israel according to Joab's census?
questions.correct_answer: One million one hundred thousand and eighty thousand
options: One million one hundred thousand and eighty thousand
questions.explanation: Joab's count gave Israel one million one hundred eighty thousand men able to go to war in 1 Chronicles 21.

questions.question: What did the angel of the Lord do to the people of Israel?
questions.correct_answer: Smote them from morning until the time appointed
options: Smote them from morning until the time appointed
questions.explanation: The angel of the Lord struck Israel from morning until evening during the plague in 1 Chronicles 21.

questions.question: Which threshing floor did David buy to build an altar?
questions.explanation: David bought Araunah's threshing floor to offer sacrifices and stop the plague in 1 Chronicles 21.

questions.question: What did David assemble to prepare for building the temple?
questions.correct_answer: Silver, gold, brass, iron, woods, and precious stones
options: Silver, gold, brass, iron, woods, and precious stones
questions.explanation: David prepared materials such as metals, woods, and stones for the temple in 1 Chronicles 22.

questions.question: Who did the Lord choose to build the house of the Lord?
questions.explanation: God chose Solomon, David's son, to build the temple as stated in 1 Chronicles 22.

questions.question: Who did David say the Lord had chosen to rule over Israel?
questions.explanation: David declared that the Lord had chosen Solomon to rule in 1 Chronicles 28.

questions.question: What did David tell Solomon to seek from the Lord with all his heart?
questions.explanation: David urged Solomon to seek wisdom and understanding from the Lord in 1 Chronicles 28.

questions.question: How much gold did David give for the temple materials?
questions.explanation: David gave three thousand talents of gold for the temple in 1 Chronicles 29.

questions.question: How did David conclude his prayer in chapter 29?
questions.correct_answer: Blessed be thou, Lord God of Israel, our father, forever and ever
options: Blessed be thou, Lord God of Israel, our father, forever and ever
Grant us peace in our days
May your name be praised in all the earth
questions.explanation: David ended his prayer by blessing the Lord God of Israel in 1 Chronicles 29.

questions.explanation: Gomer is listed as the father of Ashkenaz and Riphath in 1 Chronicles 1.

questions.correct_answer: The people offered willingly and rejoiced

The people were silent and fearful

questions.correct_answer: Then thou shalt prosper, and then thou shalt have good success

Then thou shalt never be challenged

questions.correct_answer: Because all things come from the Lord and are His

questions.explanation: David said he gave with a willing heart because all things come from the Lord in 1 Chronicles 29.

questions.question: What skill did Jonathan the son of Uzziah possess?
questions.correct_answer: He was skilful in the word of knowledge
options: He was skilful in the word of knowledge
questions.explanation: Jonathan the son of Uzziah is described as skillful in the word of knowledge in 1 Chronicles 29.
